data.title: You have been eating Subway the Wrong way until now Check this out 👇
data.description:
A typical sandwich at Subway can be 550 to 650 calories!


Here’s how I build a weight-loss-friendly, no insulin spike sandwich under 250 calories:


✅ Bread: Choose Multigrain or Honey Oats – scoop out the soft part, keep just the crust.


Skip the cheese, it adds unnecessary calories and fat.


Toast it, It releases dextrin, making it crispier and tastier.


✅ Veggies: Go all in – lettuce, cucumber, onion, tomato, peppers (avoid marinated ones).


Add only a few olives – a tiny boost of flavor, not fat.


✅ Best sauces: Mustard or BBQ – both are usually fat-free.

.

data.title: Watch This Before Putting Gond Katira In Your Diet 👇
data.description:
Comment ‘YES’ if you’re ready to start your wellness program with us :)


INGREDIENTS for 1 Serving Super Drink:


4 tsp Sattu (roasted gram flour)

2 tsp Gond Katira (pre-soaked)

Pinch of pink salt

1 tsp Roasted Jeera Powder

200 ml Buttermilk (chass)


Method:

➡️ In a glass, add satu, gond katira, pink salt, and roasted jeera powder.

➡️ Pour in chilled buttermilk and stir until smooth.

➡️ Top with fresh coriander leaves and enjoy!


Why I love it (and why you will too):


Satu keeps you full and gives your body clean plant protein & it’s easy on digestion.

Gond katira is a natural body-cooler & aids weight loss.

Pink salt helps your body stay hydrated and balances your sodium.

Roasted jeera powder does wonders for bloating and supports digestion.

Buttermilk is light, probiotic-rich, and great for your gut.

Coriander adds freshness and a dose of vitamin C.


Will you add this to your diet?

data.title: Aloo & roti- an ideal meal??
data.description:
Have you ever noticed that you go into a slump after eating rice or roti and Aloo sabzi for lunch???🍛


You are certainly right in feeling so!!!😒


Most Indians prefer to carry a lunch comprising of Chapati with sabji, rice with very little dal and again a quick and easy sabzi.🍛


These options are high on simple carbs, simple carbs tend to raise our blood sugars at a pace quicker than the body can assimilate or digest.🤔


Hence this extra sugar in the system causes us to fall drowsy and also these sugars find no way to get utilized or burnt off.


So they get Converted to fat and find space in the abdominal cavity. 


Making us proud owners of the paunch that we carry all day all night.


Therefore an ideal lunch must consist of:👇👇👇


A portion of salad preferably includes sprouts, a small portion of rice or one roti, a green vegetable without potatoes and a serving of Dal or Curd.

•Tomato

Step 2

Step 4

Enjoy hot with mint-coriander chutney!

data.title: Watch This Before Putting Gond Katira In Your Diet 👇
data.description:
Comment ‘YES’ if you’re ready to start your wellness program with us :)


INGREDIENTS for 1 Serving Super Drink:


4 tsp Sattu (roasted gram flour)

2 tsp Gond Katira (pre-soaked)

Pinch of pink salt

1 tsp Roasted Jeera Powder

200 ml Buttermilk (chass)


Method:

➡️ In a glass, add satu, gond katira, pink salt, and roasted jeera powder.

➡️ Pour in chilled buttermilk and stir until smooth.

➡️ Top with fresh coriander leaves and enjoy!


Why I love it (and why you will too):


Satu keeps you full and gives your body clean plant protein & it’s easy on digestion.

Gond katira is a natural body-cooler & aids weight loss.

Pink salt helps your body stay hydrated and balances your sodium.

Roasted jeera powder does wonders for bloating and supports digestion.

Buttermilk is light, probiotic-rich, and great for your gut.

Coriander adds freshness and a dose of vitamin C.


Will you add this to your diet?

data.title: Tips on How to read a nutritional label.
data.description:
We all want to buy Healthy and eat healthy. People are getting swayed and paying extra for Sugar-free and fat-free foods.


But Are we honestly able to decode food labels and make educated choices?


Here are very simple points on How to read a nutritional label.


Basics of food labels:


A label would guide you as to how you should be including a particular food item in your diet


👉🏻 TAKE A CLOSE LOOK AT THE INGREDIENTS


The ingredients are listed from the most added ingredients to the least added. Beware of words like sorbitol, sucrose, corn syrup & trans fats.


👉🏻 BE CAREFUL ABOUT THE INGREDIENTS.


The ingredients that you need to look at are fats, sugars, and salt.

Always remember the lesser these amounts, they are the better your food will be.


👉🏻 REMEMBER TO WATCH THE NUTRIENTS THAT ARE IMPORTANT FOR YOUR HEALTH


Read the nutritional information label very carefully. The nutrients are based on the RDA i.e. according to per 100gms.


This information also gives you the liberty to choose which brand is good for you.


👉🏻 THE REAL WORTH OF THE PRODUCT


Make sure that the product that you have purchased is worth the cost you have paid for it.


👉🏻 CHOOSE FOODS WHICH ARE LOW ON DENSITY


Go for low-energy-dense foods. Energy density refers to the ratio of calories to the weight of the food.

data.title: Recipe of Healthy Apple Cookies (under 5 min)
data.description:
Recipe of Healthy Apple Cookies (under 5 min) 🍎


Calories: 95 per slice only!


Ingredients:


Rolled oats / Meusli - 2 tbsp

Unsweetened peanut butter - 1 tbsp (optional)

Walnuts (crushed) - 1 tsp

Cinnamon powder - 1/2 tsp

Apple - 1 medium


Method:

Combine the oats or muesli and cinnamon in a dry pan over medium heat and toast, stirring occasionally, until the oats are golden.

Cool before using.


Core and slice the apple into rounds.


Spread 1 tbsp of peanut butter on slices and sprinkle with walnuts and oats/ muesli.


For children, add some chocolate sauce to make it exciting :)


P.S. serve chilled 😎 Will you try this recipe at home?

data.title: Which Oats are the best for Digestion & Weight management?
data.description:
Let’s break down the difference!

Rolled oats take the win regarding steady energy, digestion, and weight loss. Here’s why:


🥄 Rolled Oats (per 40g serving): ✅

Calories: 150

Fat: 5g

Fiber: 6g

Glycemic Index (GI): 55

Glycemic Load (GL): 11


🥄 Instant Oats (per 40g serving): ✅

Calories: 200

Fat: 3g

Fiber: 3g

Glycemic Index (GI): 80

Glycemic Load (GL): 17


📊 Rolled oats have more fiber and a lower GI, keeping you fuller longer and helping you avoid those blood sugar spikes.

If you are a beginner or have not been used to adding fiber to your diet, start with instant Oats so your system will slowly get ready to accept the fiber & then move on to the rolled oats. 🙂.


P.S. Oats are healthy, do not trust videos that say otherwise ❌


(rolled oats, weight loss, healthy oats)

data.description:

SUPER SMOOTHIE RECIPE

data.title: Kesar Tea Recipe for WeightLoss
data.description:

RECIPE:


👉 Ingredients:


Boiling Water: 1 litre in a pot

Cumin Seeds (Jeera): 1 tbsp

Cinnamon: A few sticks

Grated Ginger: 1 tbsp

Saffron (Kesar): 2 strands

(I have used @organicspree Kesar)


👉 Method:


➡ Boil water and add cumin seeds, cinnamon, grated ginger, and saffron strands.

➡ Let it steep for a few minutes.

➡ Strain and store the liquid in a bottle.


👉 Benefits of this Drink:


1) Cinnamon: Helps regulate blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and aid digestion.

2) Cumin Seeds: Boosts metabolism, improves digestion, and reduces bloating.

3) Grated Ginger: A natural fat burner that boosts metabolism & helps burn belly fat.

4) Saffron (Kesar): Reduces hunger cravings and supports fat metabolism, while being rich in antioxidants.


Do try this & send us your feedback :)

data.title: Carrot tomato soup
data.description:
BN Super Soup ✅


Ingredients:

•Carrots, roughly chopped - 1 small

•Fresh coriander leaves - 2 Tsp

•Bay leaves - 2g

•Black peppercorns - 1/4th tsp

•Onion (chopped) - 10g

•Tomato - 1 small

•Garlic, chopped - 10g

•Oil - 1/2 Tsp

•White pepper powder - 1/4th tsp 

•Salt - to taste

•Water - as required


Step 1:

Chop fresh coriander leaves finely and reserve the stems. Heat ulive oil in a pan, Add bay leaves, peppercorns, onion, tomato, garlic and saute for two minutes. 

Step 2:

Add carrots, coriander stems and three cups of water and bring to a boil. When the carrots are completely cooked, blend to a fine puree. 

Step 3:

Take the puree in a pan and bring it to a boil. 

Step 4:

Add white pepper powder dissulved in a little water. Add salt and finely chopped fresh coriander.

data.title: Carrot zucchini pancake
data.description:
Weight loss Breakfast under 250 Calories! 


Before the carrots disappear, here’s a recipe that can be a garma garam breakfast & can double up as dinner too. 


I call it the ‘Carrot Zucchini Pancake’ :)


Recipe:


• Wheat flour - 1 tbsp 

• Besan - 1 tbsp 

• Thickly grated zucchini and carrot - ½ cup 

• Green chilies [chopped] - ½ tsp

• Coriander leaves [chopped] - 1 tsp 

• Salt - as per taste 

• Oil - ½ tsp


Method:


Step 1

In a bowl, add wheat flour, besan, zucchini, carrot, green chillies, coriander leaves, salt and water to make the batter of pouring consistency. 


Step 2

Heat ½ tsp oil in a non-stick pan, pour the batter into the pan and spread evenly to make a pancake. 


Step 3

Once it turns golden brown flip it for the other side to cook.


Step 4

Place it on a plate. Serve hot.

data.title: Fennel tea
data.description:
Fennel tea commonly known as sauf Ki chai helps with Bloating & PCOS ✅


While we all know that fennel seeds help in digestion and are commonly used in India after a meal as digestive, very few people are aware of its benefits in managing hormonal imbalances!


Fennel seeds help in reducing androgen, a male hormone, in the body which can help decrease hirsutism (excessive hair on the face).


Recipe: 


• Mix 2 tsp fennel seed powder in 1.5 cups of water & boil for 5 minutes on a slow flame. 


• Strain & have this with lime.


Ideal time: 


Before breakfast & after dinner 😇

data.title: How I Lost 40 kg Being a Working Mother!
data.description:
As women, we are expected to balance the responsibilities of our homes, kids, and work. In the midst of this, our health sometimes takes a back seat.


I too face this struggle. As a working woman, busy executive, and mother, I require simple, on-the-go meals. I need to be able to grab a quick bite from outside when I don’t have time to cook or pack a meal. I need to do all this while maintaining my weight and my health as a nutritionist!


So here is how I managed to eat smartly on a busy day at work & home. It may not be perfect, but it certainly was a day where I could have ended up having a lot more calories than I did here :)


You don’t have to always eat “healthy” or “right”, you just have to eat SMART.

data.title: This dirnk gives you 15g of protein (Sattu)
data.description:
Add 15g protein that is natural, easy to digest & low in calories to your diet with this Drink. 


It also has calcium, iron & probiotics. 


Find the recipe below: 


Ingredients: 

*Sattu flour - 3 tbsp

*Water / buttermilk made in Greek yogurt - 1 glass

*Lime juice - 1/2 tsp

*Mint leaves - 4 to 5 

*Roasted cumin powder - 1/2 tsp

*Black salt / Chaat masala - as needed 


Here's how you can make it: 


Step 1: Prepare sattu flour by grinding roasted horse gram to a fine powder. 


Step 2: Take a vessel, add sattu flour, water or buttermilk and mix well. 


Add lemon juice, mint leaves, black salt, roasted cumin powder and mix well.


Step 3: Pour into a glass, add ice cubes and serve.


Ideal in summer for your entire family!

data.title: Low calorie Thandai
data.description:
Low-Calorie Thandai Recipe for Weight Watchers this Holi!


A regular glass of Thandai can give you almost 400 calories & if you don’t stop at 1, you only end up guzzling the entire day’s calorie allowance by having only 4 glasses! 


Here is a recipe that reduces your calories by 300 per glass!


INGREDIENTS:

Milk (skim, nut, oat) - 1 glass

Honey - 1 tsp (optional)

Dried Rose Petals - 1 tsp

Pistachios (Chopped)- 1 tsp

You can also add cardamon powder, fennel powder & even pepper powder to enhance the taste, no harm done :)


Mix all the ingredients in a shaker, add some ice cubes & give it a good shake. 


Serve chilled topped with nuts & petals! 


P.S. Treat yourself to 2 glasses if you like it :)

data.title: Low calorie hakka noodles
data.description:
Low-calorie, Low-Carb Veg Hakka Noodles that you can have in your diet & lose weight!


As promised, here is my recipe to make delicious noodles that can be had for lunch/dinner:


Here are some points to remember:


1. Make sure you are using minimal oil, avoid adding oil while boiling noodles. Run them in ice water, they won’t stick.

2. The amount of raw vegetables has to be 3 times the amount of noodles in the recipe.

3. Do not add AJI-NO-MOTO (monosodium glutamate).

4. Have 1 soup bowl only, maintain portion control.


Lastly, to make it a complete meal add a portion of protein as well. Add 40g tofu, 4 tbsp bean sprouts, 75g chicken or 3 egg whites to the above recipe & a complete healthy meal is ready!

data.title: Panipuri
data.description:
Paani Puri, Puchka and Gol Gappe simply cannot be refused to clients even when they are on a diet :)


Here is how we add them into your diet as your nutritionists.


1. Remember, less is more!

having one Panipuri or having six will not change the taste. You are having it to beat a craving and not as a meal. So stick to one or two only.


2. Portions Matter:

The unhealthy part over here is the fried Puri. So we are reducing that and focusing more on the white pea curry (ragda) and the moong - both are plant protein.


3. This is an all Vegan Dish:

You have a silver lining here :) so here is something for you too.


4. This is not a meal, the chaats are:

A bowl of moong chaat with mint chutney & tamarind chutney, and a bowl of ragda chat with onions, tomatoes & chutneys can make a good high protein vegan, gluten-free meal that’s low on calories too!

data.title: High protein breakfast (Fruits, egg, dryfruits)
data.description:
Is your high-protein breakfast also a high-fat one? Check here!


This breakfast plate is not ideal for anyone who wants to lose weight.


Here are some examples of where the most common diet mistakes happen:


MISTAKE:

- Most of us think that nuts are extremely healthy and must be had in good amounts on a daily basis.


TRUTH:

- Nuts are high in calories & also fat.

- A single serving of nuts therefore must not be more than 2 to 3 pieces at a time.


MISTAKE:


- Though eggs are considered very healthy, they are also high in cholesterol as well as fat.

If you are looking to lose weight, adding yolks to the diet may lead to no loss in your overall weight.


TRUTH:

- An ideal weight loss portion for eggs would be three whites and half a yolk.


CONCLUSION:


- Eating nuts in the “right quantity” can help curb sugar cravings & provide you with energy & fat-soluble vitamins.

- ⁠Having healthy foods is good. However, understand the implication of the overall calories coming from those and portion your meals accordingly.


To know more about our personalized diet programs,

Nutritionist Akansha: 9820792855

data.title: Fat burning tea ( Turmeric , blackpepper, lemon)
data.description:
Fat Burning Tea Recipe:


Along with aiding weight loss, this Tea is anti-inflammatory & has immune-boosting properties. 


METHOD:

Step 1: Slow boil 1.5 cups of water.

Step 2: Add the Turmeric powder to the water while it's boiling. 

Step 3: Boil for 1 min on a slow flame until it is reduced to 1 cup. 

Step 4: Add to a cup, add the black pepper powder & juice of a quarter of a lime.


BEST TIME TO HAVE:

Have this Early morning on an empty stomach for 2 weeks. Let us know how much weight you have lost once done :)


REMINDER:

This drink will not work on its own without a healthy & sustainable diet & lifestyle plan.

data.title: Fennel tea
data.description:
Fennel tea commonly known as sauf Ki chai helps with Bloating & PCOS.


While we all know that fennel seeds help in digestion and are commonly used in India after a meal as digestive, very few people are aware of its benefits in managing hormonal imbalances!


Fennel seeds help in reducing androgen, a male hormone, in the body which can help decrease hirsutism (excessive hair on the face).


Recipe:


• Mix 2 tsp fennel seed powder in 1.5 cups of water & boil for 5 minutes on a slow flame.


• Strain & have this with lime.


Ideal time:


Before breakfast & after dinner 😇

Not very long ago my hair fall got worse. That’s when I started drinking this juice daily in my breakfast.

This easy addition to your diet can make a significant difference in the health of your hair.

Beetroot: Packed with antioxidants and iron, to encourage healthy growth and Maintain good hair.

Carrot: Carrots thicken hair, improve scalp health, and reduce breakage. 

Apple: Rich in vitamins and minerals.

Cinnamon: Cinnamon increases blood flow to the scalp.


Ingredients: 

👉 1 medium-sized beetroot, peeled and chopped

👉 1 medium-sized carrot, peeled and chopped.

👉 1 apple, chopped.

One cup of water

Chop the apple, carrots, and beets and place them in a blender, add water to adjust consistency.


Add a pinch of cinnamon or jeera powder.


Blend until it’s smooth. Avoid straining.


P.S. Being consistent is essential! 

In addition to this juice, ensure you are well hydrated, having good sleep & a healthy diet that is rich in protein & minerals that is essential for hair health.

data.title: Monsoon tea recipe
data.description:
A chai that helps you lose weight is like watching a super hit movie starring Shahrukh, Salman & Hrithik together 😍


Here is the Recipe: 


INGREDIENTS:


* Cinnamon powder - ½ tsp 

* Ginger (fresh) - ½ inch 🫚

* Saunf (fennel seeds) - ½ tsp 

* Mint leaves - 4-5 no.🍃

* Whole pepper - 3-4 no. 

* Water - 1.5 cups

* Tea Bag (green, black tea) - 1 no. 


DIRECTIONS:


Step 1:

Add ginger, saunf, mint leaves, and whole pepper to a pounder & make a paste.


Step 2:

Add the water to a pan & bring it to a boil. Add this paste to it. 


Step 3:

Let it simmer for 2 minutes, sit for 5 minutes to absorb the compounds from the spices & enjoy hot.


🍃Cinnamon, mint leaves, and saunf help you boost your metabolism, help in better digestion, and keep you full for hours which aids in weight loss.

data.title: the truth about cooking oil

Think "Cold-Pressed" Means Fewer Calories? Think Again! 🛑


Most people think some oils are "healthier" than others because they're cold-pressed or labeled as heart-friendly. But here’s the truth that Nutritionist Khyati Rupani decodes in our latest podcast: 🎉🤯✨


🔥 All oils are 100% cholesterol-free (because only animal products contain cholesterol).

🔥 Every oil has the SAME calories – whether it's olive, coconut, or vegetable oil.

🔥 What matters most is the type of fat inside – some oils are packed with healthy fats, others… not so much!

data.title: Ever noticed how roti, rice, and dal just don’t feel the same anymore?
data.description:
Ever noticed how roti, rice, and dal just don’t feel the same anymore?


Growing up, these were the staples in our home.

But back then, roti was made from grains ground at home.

Rice wasn’t ready in 10 minutes. It took time, and it had all the fiber.


Now?

It’s all refined.

Roti feels like maida.

Rice is just starch.

We eat, we feel sleepy.

And slowly, our health pays the price. Weight gain, fatigue, even fatty liver.


The truth is, our ancestors knew what they were doing.

They ate whole foods. They took time to cook.

And they didn’t need diets, detoxes, or supplements.


Maybe we don’t need to eat less.

Maybe we just need to eat like they did.

data.title: High Fibre Weight Loss Diet Plan (Challenge)
data.description:
Fibre - Blessing or Curse?


Most of us dietitians swear by fibre & its benefits in weight loss, diabetes, thyroid management & many other health conditions. 


Hence, most weight loss diet is high on fibre & contain foods like brown rice, millets, fruits & vegetables.


A human body requires 25 - 30g fibre in a day.


Benefits of fibre:

👉 Lowers your cholesterol level 

👉 Helps control blood sugar levels

👉 Aids in achieving a healthy weight


But given our current lifestyle, we barely manage to get in 15 g of fibre leading to a lot of weight gain & digestive issues.


Sometimes however some diet plans contain a lot more than 40 g of fibre & if had over a long time it can be harmful.


Hence, if your symptoms are persistent for more than three months, make sure you inform your dietitian about this & she will alter the amount of fibre for you.


P.S - Make sure you have a good water intake when on a high fibre diet 💦


To get a personalised plan, comment "I want a diet" or DM us.

data.title: Want to know an easy hack for weight loss? (Portion size with palm)
data.description:
Want to know an easy hack for weight loss?


Just use your palm!


It is a common misunderstanding that the only key to weight loss is to eat foods that are healthy and low calorie.


This is where most people go wrong‼️


Well, the truth is that it's not just about eating healthy or low-calorie foods. There is another mantra that is important for weight loss and that is ‘PORTION SIZE’.


Increased portion sizes are thought to contribute excessive calories and unwanted weight gain. Even healthy binging is harmful to health!


The more you have on your plate, the more you eat & the more you gain!


👉🏻So here’s how you can use just your palm to understand portion size


1 serving of carbohydrates (cereals, millets)= 1 cupped hand


1 serving of veggies & salads = 1 fist


1 serving of fats (butter, ghee)= 1 thumb


1 serving of high protein foods (paneer, chicken, fish, tofu) = 1 palm


You need to be wise about your portion size!


That is why at Balance Nutrition we educate our clients about portion size with our BN exclusive Eat-In- Portions Guide which gives them a clear idea about how much to eat!

data.title: Can we re-use leftover oil?
data.description:
It is a very common practice in all Indian households to reuse the extra oil that is left over after frying.


Over the last 15 years in my practice, I have been telling all our clients as well as on videos over social media how harmful this practice can be.


A detailed understanding of the health risks of reused or reheated oils is important. Not only homes, hotels, and outside eateries reheat the oils for deep frying. FSSAI, Food License Registration Services (THE INDIA DOCS) doesn’t have any regulation for reused cooking oils.


If the oil isn’t changed regularly during deep frying there is the formation of Total Polar Matter, which is not digestible. It can increase the risk of heart disease, and gastrointestinal disorders.


The Total Polar Matter is a reliable international indicator of cooking oil degradation. TPM should be below 24-25 to ensure safe consumption. In our country, however, there are no laws or any testing methods that are implied by the regulatory bodies or the hotels.


Simply put,

1. Oils that are used for frying once should not be reused for any purpose.

2. Use just enough oil to fry & avoid wastage

3. Ensure the oil you use at home while frying does not start emitting smoke.

4. Fry on low heat using the smallest burner & a small utensil.

data.title: Are avocados good for weight loss??
data.description:
Most of us associate avocados with health & weight loss.


However, on the contrary, Avocado is high in calories & high in fat.


1 whole medium avocado contains about 240 calories, 13 grams of carbohydrates, 3 grams of protein, and 22 grams of fat. So we will not be adding it to your diet!


Hence, you need to balance off your calorie & fat intake if you want to add avocados to your diet.


To lose weight, focus on consuming low-calorie, low fat & high volume meals.


Do not get confused with HEALTHY and LOW CALORIE :)


Depending on your goal, make wise choices!

data.title: Chia Seeds can cause constipation
data.description:
Chia seeds are rich in fiber, protein, omega-3 fatty acids, antioxidants and micronutrients.


They may aid weight loss and help reduce inflammation, blood cholesterol and triglycerides.


However, you have to be careful while adding them to your diet:


👉 Chia seeds are able to absorb 10–12 times their weight in liquid.


👉 If they’re not soaked before you eat them, they may expand and cause a blockage, increasing your risk of choking.


👉 Chia seeds can lower blood sugar and blood pressure. People on medications for high blood pressure or diabetes should moderate their portion sizes to prevent interactions.


Consult a Nutritionist before adding them to the diet.

data.title: Chai Vs Chai Busicuit
data.description:
There are so many misconceptions going around which often villainise certain foods.


It is important to make smart choices about the food!


👉Chai vs chai with biscuits- Drinking just a cup of tea a day won’t make you fat, but what we pair with it matters! Biscuits are usually high in sugars and fats. Make sure to pair your Chai with other snacks like nuts or Makhana.


👉Fruits vs fruit juice- No fruit can make you fat when eaten in limit. Talking about fruit juices, they may seem like they’re healthy, but fruits when juiced lose their fiber content and are basically sugar water!


👉Potato vs fried potato- Potato as it is doesn’t make you fat. When it is fried, it adds calories. The way it is cooked matters more!


👉Dryfruits vs pastry- Yes, dry fruits are high in calories and natural sugars, but if you avoid it for this reason and later land up binging on cakes and pastries, it negates the whole purpose. Eat whole and natural foods over processed ones.


Don’t buy into myths and don’t villainise certain foods over others. Instead focus on what Nutrition you can get out of a certain food!

data.title: Monsoon Tea Reel
data.description:
Want a TEA that burns fat while keeping you refreshed?


Here’s a simple yet powerful Weight Loss Tea Recipe made with Indian kitchen superfoods 👇


INGREDIENTS

* Cinnamon powder - ½ tsp

* Ginger (fresh) - ½ inch 🫚

* Saunf (fennel seeds) - ½ tsp

* Mint leaves - 4-5 🍃

* Whole pepper - 3-4

* Water - 1.5 cups

* Tea Bag (green, black tea) - 1

* Honey - Optional


DIRECTIONS:


Step 1:

Add ginger, saunf, mint leaves, and whole pepper to a pounder & make a paste.


Step 2:

Add the water to a pan & bring it to a boil. Add this paste to it.


Step 3:

Let it simmer for 2 minutes, sit for 5 minutes to absorb the compounds from the spices & enjoy hot.


🍃Cinnamon, mint leaves, and saunf help you boost your metabolism, help in better digestion, and keep you full for hours, which aids in weight loss.

data.title: Hitting my protein goals exercising and still not able to lose weight
data.description:
Why Your Protein Isn’t Working for Fat Loss!


Instagram is all about: “Eat more protein if you want to lose weight post 40.”


So, you religiously started adding protein powders, protein bars, and still…

- No inch loss

- No weight loss

- Cravings still showing up


If you ask me, I have examined many women over the last few years & I can clearly state that it is not just about eating more protein, but about understanding your body, hormonal imbalances & identifying the root cause.


In most cases, a sudden intake of a high-protein diet & rigorous workouts worsens Inflammation, leading to weight gain, bloating & other digestive issues.


What is the best way to reverse Inflammation & lose weight, then?


1. Contrary to popular belief, weight loss-friendly foods like raw salads, raw fruits, beans & pulses will worsen inflammation. A diet that is high in cooked vegetables, well-cooked millets & probiotic-rich foods like curds will address both Inflammation & weight.


2. Superfoods from the Indian Kitchen, like Jeera (cumin), Turmeric Powder, Pepper Powder & Fennel Seeds are known to help with Inflammation, especially when had with hot water.


3. Instead of lifting, HIIT & Aggressive cardio, rest & recovery are shown to heal the body & help with weight loss.


4. Sleep cycle management is the most underrated remedy for weight loss & inflammation.


Want to know how to structure your meals for fat loss in your 40s?


Comment “BALANCE” below if you’re looking for an online diet plan.

data.title: Three hidden reasons your body stores fat
data.description:
Tried Diet & Exercise, still no fat loss?


It could be these reasons👇🏻

⁣⁣⁣⁣

1. You are eating less but still can’t lose weight - in fact, you might even be gaining. ⁣⁣⁣⁣

⁣⁣⁣

2. You’re consistently doing HIIT or intense cardio classes, and your belly fat doesn’t budge

⁣⁣⁣⁣

3. You have changed nothing in the way you eat or work out, yet suddenly you are gaining weight. ⁣⁣⁣⁣

⁣⁣⁣⁣

Your body is storing fat! It’s just science. ⁣⁣⁣⁣

⁣⁣⁣⁣

We spend all this time trying to do the right thing- the things we have been taught to be true. But actually, many times those are the things that sabotage us. ⁣⁣⁣⁣

⁣⁣⁣⁣

What you need:⁣⁣⁣⁣

⁣⁣⁣

- an adequate amount of food in the right ratios to spike your metabolism⁣⁣⁣⁣

⁣⁣⁣⁣

data.title: Fruits with HIgh, Moderate and Low sugar content (Carousel)
data.description:
All of us are talking about blood sugar spikes & foods that cause minimal spikes.


As a nutritionist, I have not been a fan of this concept. We are taught this in college. Refined foods, high starch & high carb foods will cause a spike, but the entirety of the concept is not that.


To make things simple, here is a list I made to help you all make wise choices.

When you know which fruits are low, moderate, or high in sugar, you can automatically:


✔ Avoid unwanted blood sugar spikes

✔ Keep your energy steady throughout the day

✔ Support your overall health without cutting out the sweetness you love


To understand this in detail, here’s a reference:


✅ Low sugar (5g or less per 100g). Best for everyday snacking and smoothies.

⬇️ Moderate sugar (6–10g per 100g). Enjoy in balance, perfect for mid-day pick-me-ups.

⚠️ High sugar (Over 10g per 100g). Delicious but best treated like dessert.


Whether you’re managing your health, watching your carbs, or just curious about nutrition, this guide will help you make informed, guilt-free choices.


Save this post for your next fruit order, and share it with someone who needs to see this today!


Want your personalised diet plan today?


(fruit sugar guide, low sugar fruits, fruits for diabetics, sugar content in fruits, healthy fruit choices, blood sugar management, fruits and glycemic index, nutrition tips for weight loss, best fruits for energy, sugar levels in fruits)

data.title: Exercising and hitting protein goals and still not able to lose weight
data.description:
Why Your Protein Isn’t Working for Fat Loss!


Instagram is all about: “Eat more protein if you want to lose weight post 40.”


So, you religiously started adding protein powders, protein bars, and still…

- No inch loss

- No weight loss

- Cravings still showing up


If you ask me, I have examined many women over the last few years & I can clearly state that it is not just about eating more protein, but about understanding your body, hormonal imbalances & identifying the root cause.


In most cases, a sudden intake of a high-protein diet & rigorous workouts worsens Inflammation, leading to weight gain, bloating & other digestive issues.


What is the best way to reverse Inflammation & lose weight, then?


1. Contrary to popular belief, weight loss-friendly foods like raw salads, raw fruits, beans & pulses will worsen inflammation. A diet that is high in cooked vegetables, well-cooked millets & probiotic-rich foods like curds will address both Inflammation & weight.


2. Superfoods from the Indian Kitchen, like Jeera (cumin), Turmeric Powder, Pepper Powder & Fennel Seeds are known to help with Inflammation, especially when had with hot water.


3. Instead of lifting, HIIT & Aggressive cardio, rest & recovery are shown to heal the body & help with weight loss.


4. Sleep cycle management is the most underrated remedy for weight loss & inflammation.


Want to know how to structure your meals for fat loss in your 40s?


Comment “BALANCE” below if you’re looking for an online diet plan.


(Protein and fat loss, weight loss after 40, women’s health, hormonal balance, gut health, inflammation, anti-inflammatory foods, Indian superfoods, sleep & weight loss, sustainable fat loss)

data.title: The 5 Habits That Helped  Me Lose 40 Kg And Never Gain It Back
data.description:
“Losing weight is never easy,

but what’s harder is maintaining the lost weight. As a nutritionist, I lost 40 kg when I was 24 years old. It took me 2 years to do so, & I have managed to keep 37kg away for almost 15 years now.


Here’s how I Did it:


1️⃣ Never ate carbs alone; I always pair rice & roti with dal, veggies, or curd. It balances blood sugar, reduces cravings, and prevents fat storage.


2️⃣ Carry a backup snack; Whether it’s travel, meetings, or long workdays, I never leave without fresh fruits, makhana, yogurt, or roasted chana. It saves me from last-minute junk food.


3️⃣ Morning Superfood drink; Coriander seed + fennel seed water with Cinnamon powder is my daily start. It reduces bloating, improves digestion, and keeps inflammation low.


4️⃣ Stay socially connected; Meeting friends and family often lifts my mood, reduces stress, and keeps my emotional health strong.


5️⃣ 10k steps + 10 minutes of silence; Walking keeps my metabolism active, while silence grounds my mind and focus.


These habits aren’t fancy, but they’re sustainable, and that’s what keeps all clients at BN losing weight & maintaining it for good.


Tag a friend who’s ready for simple wins in midlife :)


(Weight loss journey, Maintain lost weight, Sustainable weight loss, Midlife weight loss, Nutritionist tips, Healthy lifestyle habits, Gut health & digestion, Reduce cravings naturally)

data.title: This Tiny Spice Can Fix Your Gut & Speed Up Weight Loss
data.description:
Don’t know what Hing is? No worries 🙂

It’s also known as Asafoetida, a powerful spice widely used in Indian cooking.


But here’s the secret most people don’t know ⬇️

Hing isn’t just for flavor… it can actually support better digestion, gut health & weight loss!

Here’s how you can consume it for better health & weight loss:


In a glass of warm water, add a pinch of Hing & have it 20 minutes before your meals. You can follow this mainly pre-dinner.


This will ensure you can digest your meals better and get rid of gas. And the most potent benefit?


It helps fight small infections in the gut.


So tell me… will you try this Hing hack tonight?

data.title: 13 kg Weight Loss at 50!
data.description:
To know more about our online diet program and how we work, contact Krishna at +917021960648


Meet Sonal Gilitwala, a 50-year-old from Mumbai who proved that you don’t have to give up your favourite food to lose weight!


With the help of Head Nutritionist Kajal from Balance Nutrition, Sonal followed a customized online diet plan based on simple Gujarati meals , no fad diets, no restrictions.


In just 90 days, she lost 8.8 kg, improved her BP, reduced acidity, and eased menopause symptoms. With continued guidance, her total fat loss reached 13.4 kg and she dropped 3 inches from her waist and chest and 8 inches from her hips!


This is more than just a diet, it’s a health transformation journey that proves balance works better than restriction.


Comment “I want a Diet” to start your personalized transformation today!


(Keywords: Weight Loss Journey, Online Diet Program, Gujarati Meals, Inch Loss, Menopause Diet, Balanced Nutrition, Health Transformation, Acidity & BP Control, Women’s Health, Confidence Through Health)

data.title: Sneha Lost 36kg with Our Online Diet!
data.description:
Sneha lost 36kg with our online diet program.


She also saw a huge amount of inch loss, which is visible in her transformation.


This tends to happen when we have a high body fat. Since fat occupies more space in our body, it makes us look huge & bloated. So, when you lose 500g of fat weight, it looks like a 3 kg loss ‼


👉 She enjoys her regular meals. Her diet was simple and practical.

👉 Her weight loss journey is still on & she has a goal to lose 35 kg more. 🤩

data.title: This Diwali, Balance Nutrition Takes Its Next Big Step
data.description:
Ten years ago, our Founder and Clinical Nutritionist Khyati Rupani started answering nutrition questions on Facebook. Never imagined it would grow into what Balance Nutrition is today.


This Diwali, we’re taking another beautiful step forward with our first-ever range of healthy, quick-filler snacks, curated with love and health in mind.


They’re perfect for diabetics, weight watchers, and even kids because good food should be simple, nourishing, and easy to enjoy.

data.title: Comment ‘Fasting’ to find out if Intermittent Fasting will help you lose weight after 40 in 2025! 🎯
data.description:
My Favourite Actor Ram Kapoor Loses 42kg in 7 Months at 51 Years of Age!


He is easily the Transformation of 2024!


Let’s find out how he managed it:

Instead of taking the easier way out and opting for Ozempic, Ram has diligently followed the 16-hour Intermittent Fasting method to achieve this transformation.


How to Lose Weight After Turning 40 & What Does It Entail?

1. Forget Low-Calorie Diets: Focus on protein, complex carbs, and healthy fiber.

2. Forget Shortcuts: No drug can help you lose weight without severely impacting your thyroid, liver, or kidneys.

3. Forget Regular Late Nights: These affect your weight and health the most.

4. Forget Diet Sodas and Regular Alcohol Intake: Alcohol is a neurotoxin and even more harmful to the body after 40.

5. Intermittent Fasting Works— but only with guidance from a trained senior nutrition expert!


Don’t miss our great year-end offers—ending soon!

data.title: Restaurant Guide Is Now Live On App - Update Now!
data.description:
Keeping in mind you health goals & lifestyle, we’ve made it easier than ever to stay on track.


We’re excited to announce that the Balance Nutrition Restaurant Guide is officially LIVE as a feature on your Balance Nutrition App.


You’ll now be able to:


  • Log meals you eat outside from a curated calorie-counted menu.


  • Get a real-time summary of calories, protein, carbs, and fats consumed.


  • Receive instant feedback if you’ve gone above or stayed within your limits.


  • Automatically notify your mentor for personalised suggestions and support.


Whether you're dining out, attending a social gathering, or just ordering in, this guide helps you make better choices without overthinking.


To access:

UPDATE YOU APP then follow these steps 👇


Open the BN App → Home → Diet, Trackers & BN Guides → Tap on Restaurant Guide


Built for real people and real lives.


Have questions? Just message your mentor on the app.


Follow Khyati on Instagram:   / nutritionist_khyatirupani  

Follow Balance Nutrition on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/balancenutr...

data.title: Now LIVE: The Balance Nutrition Alcohol Guide on your Balance Nutrition App!
data.description:
Your guide to tracking alcohol calories, understanding macros in drinks, and making smart alcohol choices—without compromising your fitness goals.


Here’s what you can now do with this feature:


✅ Log alcohol intake with calories & macros

✅ Instantly see how your drink impacts your daily calorie goals

Whether it’s a party, brunch, or a casual drink, this guide helps you drink smarter, stay lighter, and live better.

data.title: How to Stick to the Diet While Traveling or Attending Weddings? | Balance Nutrition
data.description:
BALANCE NUTRITION is all about living a healthy lifestyle and making health care easy, engaging and accessible. Our programs are 70% diet and 30% E-Kit( https://goo.gl/e2jweJ) which contains tools and guides to make the program stress free and easy.


We have Global dine out guide, Airport guide, Travel guide for all the Travelers and Wedding/Party guide. Talking is the first step to a meaningful change and building greater awareness, acceptance and action.


Our Services :

1) WeightLoss-Pro - https://goo.gl/dq2fhH

A perfect program for those wanting to lose weight as well as inches. Depending on your goal, the diet plans are matched with your current food habits, timings & lifestyle. The plans are simple, easy to follow and with a variety of options to choose from.


2) PCOS - https://goo.gl/nrqwDd

PCOS is a hormonal disorder affecting many women leading to abnormal weight gain, high sugar levels and infertility. Losing weight is the only way to manage PCOS.Khyati Rupani, having gone through it herself is now helping more then 2000 women manage PCOS successfully.


3) Weightloss + - https://goo.gl/x33L9Q

This is a very effective program for those who have medical and health conditions such as diabetes, high cholesterol, hypothyroidism or abnormal lipid profile. This program is simple, easy to follow and effective with no special cooking or eating every two hours. Every step here is taken after studying your health records and assessment.


4) Body Transformation - https://goo.gl/stHPvw

The right mix of nutrients, water, sleep, activity and our GUIDANCE is all you need to transform.

We not only plan your nutrition, but very closely mentor you on all fronts.

This program has a Daily Food Tracker, Metabolic Boosters, Cleansing Diets, Exercise Activity Guides & Trackers. Foods to support your pre & post work out needs.


5) For Executives - https://goo.gl/9oEVHe

Active: Designed for anyone with a busy corporate lifestyle, frequent travel & erratic work hours. The focus is on making you Energetic, Active while Losing Weight & Inches. The special E-kit with tools such as Travel kit, Dine-Out guide, Alcohol Guide are designed to make the program fit into your life. It's one of the most effective weight loss programs in India for any working professional.

data.title: The Best Diet Plan for PCOS & Diabetes
data.description: Welcome to Chai Time With Khyati Rupani Episode - 16, where we discuss the importance of balance nutrition for weight loss and overall health. In this episode, Khyati Rupani shares her expertise on how to create a diet plan that suits your specific needs, whether you're looking to manage PCOS, diabetes, or simply want to lose weight. She provides valuable tips and recipes to help you achieve your weight loss journey, from weight loss diet plans to weight loss transformations. Khyati also touches on the topic of thyroid diet, cholesterol diet, and how to lose weight fast, emphasizing the need for a comprehensive approach to nutrition and diet. If you're looking for online weight loss programs or online weight loss videos, this episode is a great resource, offering practical advice on diet recipes, diet chart, and nutrition. With her extensive knowledge on PCOS diet, PCOS diet plan, and diabetes diet, Khyati Rupani is the perfect guide to help you navigate the world of weight loss and nutrition. Tune in to learn more about how to weight loss, weight loss story, and weight loss tips, and start your journey towards a healthier, happier you.

data.title: How Real Indian Food & Mindset Transform Weight, Hormones & Health!
data.description:
Can REAL INDIAN FOOD truly fix your WEIGHT, HORMONES, and overall HEALTH, without supplements, crash diets, or giving up your favourite dishes? In this powerful episode, Clinical Nutritionist Khyati Rupani, Founder of Balance Nutrition, breaks down the 3 NON-NEGOTIABLE FOOD RULES that helped her lose 40kg, reverse PCOS, and transform the lives of 75,000+ clients worldwide.


If you’re tired of low-carb diets, zero-carb myths, protein powder pressure, and supplement marketing, this conversation will completely change how you look at Indian food.


Khyati explains how protein–fibre balance, bright food combinations, and mindful volume eating beat restrictive fad diets—every single time. Learn how to structure a nutrient-rich INDIAN THALI, eat out smart, manage hormonal health, build a sustainable routine, and develop the mindset & identity shift required for long-term transformation.


This is practical nutrition for real people, real families, and real Indian lifestyles.

  • The 3 Food Rules for Natural, Lasting Weight Loss
  • Why high-protein, high-fibre, structured plates work better than low-carb diets.
  • How to Build a Hormone-Friendly INDIAN THALI
  • Smart combinations for fat loss, gut health, and metabolic balance.
  • Why Supplements Don’t Work the Way You Think
  • The truth about B12, Vitamin D, collagen, protein powders & “gut reset” products.

  • The “JUGAAD METHOD” to enjoy rice, roti, desserts, eating out, and even alcohol—smartly.

  • Why diets fail, how the brain resists “NOs,” and how identity transformation leads to lasting results.

data.title: From 99kg to Fit Mom – Khyati’s Journey 💪
data.description:
At Balance Nutrition, the journey began with a deeply personal story. Khyati Rupani, founder and nutritionist herself, once faced a reality she wasn’t prepared for being diagnosed with PCOS at just 23. In the midst of career hustle and the joy of newly married life, she had overlooked the signs: unexplained weight gain, irregular periods, and classic PCOS symptoms.


Determined to take control, she revisited her knowledge of nutrition with a fresh perspective. Instead of eliminating gluten, rice, or dairy, she focused on simple, local, homemade food. She went on to create practical lifestyle tools like the BN Restaurant Guide, BN Alcohol Guide, and BN Portion Control Guide, first for her own transformation and later for her clients.


✅ She lost 12 kg in 3 months with 99% diet and just 1% exercise.

✅ In 6 months, she reached 60 kg and conceived naturally.

✅ Even after gaining weight post-pregnancy, she lost it all before her daughter turned one while breastfeeding.

✅ For the past 8 years, she has successfully maintained her weight using smart strategies and Intermittent Fasting.


Her life experience now empowers thousands of women struggling with PCOS, infertility, and hormonal imbalances who have seen real results at Balance Nutrition because she truly understands what the journey feels like.

data.title: From Nurturer to Visionary: The Evolution of Modern Women #balancenutrition #shorts
data.description:
From Nurturer to Visionary: The Evolution of Modern Women.


For generations, society has placed men and women into boxes — men as providers, women as nurturers. But the truth is, both roles are far more dynamic and deeply human than history ever allowed us to see. 🌍


Today, women are not abandoning their nurturing nature — they’re redefining what it means to nurture. Whether it’s building a family, a business, or both, women are proving that compassion, strength, and ambition can coexist beautifully. 💪👩‍👧‍👦


Motherhood isn’t a limitation — it’s a transformation. It teaches patience, leadership, adaptability, and purpose — all the qualities that make exceptional professionals and visionaries. The balance isn’t always easy, but it’s powerful.


Let’s keep the conversation open: Can we honor traditional roles and evolve them at the same time? Because true progress doesn’t erase our roots — it expands them. 🌱

data.title: How To Eat Pav Bhaji To Lose Weight?
data.description:
To know more about our online diet program and how we work, contact at Barkha +919152419848


As a nutritionist, I get asked this all the time: “Do I have to give up my favorite Indian street foods to eat healthy?”

And my answer? Absolutely NOT.


Pav Bhaji is a gorgeous blend of vegetables, spices, and pure comfort.


Here’s my step-by-step hack to enjoy your favorite bhaji without the guilt:


1️⃣ Start with a warm, clear vegetable soup. Don’t touch the bhaji until it’s finished!

2️⃣ Have half of your green salad before diving into the bhaji!

3️⃣ Top your bhaji with chaas instead of buttered pavs. You’ll eat less and feel fuller.

4️⃣ When you’re ready, try ordering your pav without butter. Trust me, small changes make a BIG difference!


You’re not just cutting calories — you’re nourishing your body, boosting digestion, and still enjoying every bite. Step by step, healthier habits win!

Disease:

It can be cured with medical interventions, lifestyle changes, and the right mindset.

Example: Obesity, stress-induced metabolic syndrome.


Disorder:

Often genetic in nature, it may not be “cured” but can be effectively managed with the right lifestyle changes and by avoiding triggers.

Example: PCOS, thyroid, diabetes.

data.title: How To Eat Pav Bhaji To Lose Weight?
data.description:
As a nutritionist, I get asked this all the time: “Do I have to give up my favorite Indian street foods to eat healthy?”

And my answer? Absolutely NOT.


Pav Bhaji is a gorgeous blend of vegetables, spices, and pure comfort.


Here’s my step-by-step hack to enjoy your favorite bhaji without the guilt:


1️⃣ Start with a warm, clear vegetable soup. Don’t touch the bhaji until it’s finished!

2️⃣ Have half of your green salad before diving into the bhaji!

3️⃣ Top your bhaji with chaas instead of buttered pavs. You’ll eat less and feel fuller.

4️⃣ When you’re ready, try ordering your pav without butter. Trust me, small changes make a BIG difference!


You’re not just cutting calories — you’re nourishing your body, boosting digestion, and still enjoying every bite. Step by step, healthier habits win!

data.title: The Shocking Truth About Soft Bread!
data.description:

The softer the bread, the sneakier the fat.


Made through hydrogenation, these fats help texture but harm your health.

❌ Raise bad cholesterol

❌ Cause inflammation

❌ Hurt your heart


Soft pav, white bread, biscuits, and cakes often hide trans fats.

✅ Sourdough or dense loaves = cleaner choices.


Check labels. Choose smart.

What you don’t see can hurt you.

data.title: Starbucks Coffee Hack! Just 60 Calories 🤩
data.description:
From 600 to 60 CALORIES!


Here’s how I order my Starbucks coffee as a nutritionist 🍵👇


A tall Frappuccino at Starbucks is loaded with sugar and cream, and if you add extra flavors, it’s packed with artificial ingredients too.


As a nutritionist who finds ways to enjoy most foods, I’ve figured out a smarter Starbucks coffee order as well! :) I go for an Iced Americano (0 calories) and ask for 30ml of Vanilla Sweet Cream (60 calories).


In India, we don’t yet have the sugar-free, 0-calorie Vanilla Sweet Cream, but if you’re travelling abroad, do ask for it.


This option is safe for those looking to lose weight, people with controlled diabetes, as well as those managing uric acid and thyroid issues.

SOME INTERESTING FACTS ABOUT COMMON BEVERAGES:


🔹Sugar content (per 100 ml)

Regular Coke: 11g sugar

Packaged Fruit Juice: 9-12g sugar (even if it says "no added sugar")

Diet Coke: 0g sugar


🔹Calories (per 100 ml)

Regular Coke: 44 kcal

Packaged Juice: 45-50 kcal

Diet Coke: 1 kcal

data.title: Craving Chinese? Here’s How to Keep It Healthy! 🍜
data.description:
The hardest word for the human brain to comprehend is “NO.”


So when you’re on a diet that excludes a lot of foods, you’re bound to fail at some point.


At Balance Nutrition, all our clients swear by the BN Restaurant Guide, which helps them socialise and eat out smartly while staying on track with their program.


Craving Chinese? Ordering in? Eating out? Follow these simple tips:


💧 Choose sparkling water instead of sugar-loaded drinks.

🥬 Go for veggies that are sautéed, not soaked in oil.

🥡 Make your rice or noodles 50% veggies (yes, that’s allowed!).

🥵 Order chilli paneer, but ask them to skip the frying.


You’ll be happy to know this smart ordering can cut your meal’s calories by half, leading to minimal deviation in your weight loss journey!

data.title: Is Diabetes Really Hereditary? The Truth Explained! 😱
data.description:
Just because your parents have diabetes doesn’t mean you will!


Here’s the REAL reason you might get it…👇"


Genetics alone does NOT cause diabetes—it’s your lifestyle choices that trigger it.


❌ Frequent blood sugar spikes – Too much sugar & refined carbs lead to insulin resistance.

❌ Being sedentary – Lack of movement reduces your body’s ability to regulate blood sugar.

❌ Chronic stress & poor sleep – High cortisol messes with insulin function.

❌ Belly fat accumulation – Visceral fat is directly linked to metabolic disorders.

❌ Nutrient deficiencies – Low fiber, magnesium & omega-3 levels worsen insulin resistance.

data.title: The Truth About ‘Sugar-Free’ Products!
data.description:
The Truth About ‘Sugar-Free’ Products!


In the recent podcast with Meri Saheli, Khyati Rupani busted one of the biggest myths about sugar-free products. Many people assume sugar-free means healthy, but that’s far from the truth!


🔸 Most sugar-free alternatives have more fat and calories than regular products.

🔸 For diabetics, the real problem isn’t just sugar—it’s the entire processed package.

🔸 The "sugar-free" label tricks us into eating more. Instead of one regular biscuit, you might eat four sugar-free ones!

🔸 Sugar-free sweets made with figs and dates still spike blood sugar—just because they don’t contain white sugar doesn’t mean they’re safe.

data.title: The Untold Truth About Weight Loss in India!
data.description:
In a recent episode of Success Fundee, Khyati Rupani, Founder & Chief Nutritionist at Balance Nutrition, shared her journey of becoming a qualified dietitian and the challenges within the industry.


💡 How can you tell if your nutritionist is truly qualified?

In India, very few nutritionists graduate with the necessary degrees and complete the required internships. Many so-called “experts” give diet advice without proper qualifications, which can be misleading and even harmful.


A qualified nutritionist should have:

✔ A B.Sc. degree in Nutrition (B.H.Sc. is acceptable too)

✔ An M.Sc. degree in Dietetics

✔ Internship experience at a leading hospital

✔ Internship with a gym or weight loss expert

✔ More than 3 years of experience handling clients

data.title: Hormonal Imbalance: Is Your Lifestyle the Problem?
data.description:
How Good or Bad Is Today’s Lifestyle?


The rise in PCOS and hormonal imbalances among women isn’t just a coincidence—it’s a reflection of our modern lifestyle. Some key factors contributing to this trend include:


✅ Overconsumption of packaged & processed foods

✅ Ingestion of microplastics from packaging

✅ Lack of regular physical activity

✅ Low intake of fiber-rich, fresh, and local foods


Nutritionist Khyati Rupani has helped countless women take charge of their health, balance their hormones, and reverse PCOS through mindful eating and sustainable habits. At Balance Nutrition, we focus on simple, science-backed strategies to make wellness achievable for every woman.

Let’s make health a priority not a trend!

data.title: The Hidden Truth About PCOS: Are You at Risk?
data.description:
PCOS is more common than we realize, yet it often goes unnoticed, especially in younger women. In my latest podcast, I’m talking about how PCOS leads to cysts in the ovaries, hormonal imbalances, and unpredictable cycles. This can result in complications like fibroids and endometriosis, making it harder for women to manage their health.


Did you know 1 in 3 women have PCOS, and in metro cities, it’s 2 out of 3? It’s time to break the silence, raise awareness, and take action. You don’t have to face this alone.

data.title: 5 Indian Secrets for a Healthy Gut!
data.description:
Good gut health doesn’t come from quick fixes, it starts with simple, healthy habits.


In our podcast with Meri Saheli, our founder, Nutritionist Khyati Rupani, shared 5 easy foods and habits to improve your gut health naturally:


✔ Drink chaas after lunch every day to help with digestion.

✔ Start your dinner with a sabzi—like a salad, soup with veggies, or sautéed vegetables.

✔ Eat probiotics twice a week such as idli, dosa, dhokla, or dahi chawal.

✔ Begin your mornings with methi & haldi tea to keep your gut healthy.

✔ Have one amla daily to boost your immunity and balance gut bacteria.


You don’t need expensive products, small changes in your daily routine can make a big difference.

data.title: What Happens When You STOP Eating Fake HEALTHY FOODS for 30 Days #balancenutrition #weightloss
data.description:
What Happens When You STOP Eating Fake HEALTHY FOODS for 30 Days


To know more about our online diet program and how we work, contact:

Barkha – +91 9152419848


As a nutritionist who lost 40 kg and has maintained it for the last 10 years, I’ve seen both, the struggles and the success.


Losing weight is hard… but you know what’s harder?

Getting sick because of the “healthy” foods we’re told to eat!


After years of learning, I discovered that these 5 foods were silently blocking my progress and slowing my metabolism.


Here’s what I stopped eating completely:

1️⃣ Peanut Butter – High in fat & calories; 2 tbsp = ~190 kcal

2️⃣ Granola – Loaded with sugar & fats; 1 cup = ~450 kcal

3️⃣ Fruit Juice – Full of sugar, no fiber; 1 cup = ~120 kcal

4️⃣ Diet Snacks – Hidden sugars, unhealthy fats; ~150 kcal per serving

5️⃣ White Bread – Low fiber, spikes sugar; 2 slices = ~140 kcal


These look healthy, but aren’t helping your body or hormones!


Backed by science and my personal experience, making this one change helped me sustain my 40 kg weight loss and feel stronger every day.


Comment “HEALTHY” if you want me to share what I replaced these with!

data.title: Want to Lose 5kg Before Diwali? Follow This Karva Chauth Fasting Plan!
data.description:
To know more about our online diet program and how we work, contact:

Barkha – +91 9152419848


Diet Tips for a Perfect Karva Chauth Vrat!


Comment “Fast” if you want to lose 5kg before Diwali!


Want to make your fast easier and more energizing? Follow this smart nutrient sequence!


Pre-Fast [Sargi]

-Coconut water - keeps you hydrated and replenishes electrolytes.

-Hydrating fruits - watermelon, orange, apple, fiber, water, and potassium to keep energy steady.

-Healthy fats - 2 walnuts or 3–4 almonds to keep you full.

-Protein - helps preserve muscle and sustain energy.

-Carbs last - mindfully load up for the day ahead.


After the Fast

-coconut water - to prevent headaches.

-Follow with a date - gentle energy boost.

-Then enjoy a balanced meal with fiber and protein to stabilize blood sugar.

-Avoid overeating - large meals can overwhelm your digestive system.


Why it matters: Eating in the right order keeps your energy steady, prevents fatigue, and protects your muscles.

data.title: Why Protein Alone Isn’t Helping You Lose Fat!
data.description:
To know more about our online diet program and how we work, contact Krishna at +917021960648


probably seen it everywhere: “Eat more protein if you want to lose weight after 40.”

So you added protein powders, shakes, protein bars… but still facing the same issues:

❌ No inch loss

❌ Weight stuck

❌ Cravings won’t go away


Here’s the truth: After working with 1000s of women, I can confidently say that fat loss is not just about eating more protein.

It’s about understanding your body, fixing hormonal imbalances, and addressing the root cause, inflammation.


In fact, suddenly jumping to a high-protein diet + aggressive workouts can actually worsen inflammation… leading to bloating, weight gain, and digestive issues.


So what works instead?


✅ Cooked, not raw: Skip raw salads & excess fruits. Focus on cooked veggies, well-cooked millets & probiotic-rich curd.

✅ Healing spices: Jeera, turmeric, pepper & fennel seeds, taken with hot water, are natural anti-inflammatory boosters.

✅ Rest over overtraining: HIIT & heavy workouts stress the body. Rest + recovery help it heal.

✅ Fix your sleep: Deep sleep is the most underrated weight loss tool. It resets hormones and supports fat loss naturally.


If you want to know how to structure your meals for fat loss in your 40s and beyond, drop a “BALANCE” in the comments or check out our program link in the description.

data.title: Fried vs Steamed Modak: The Healthy Choice This Ganesh Chaturthi.
data.description:

Ganesh Chaturthi is here, and so is the modak dilemma! Should you go for the traditional fried version or opt for the healthier steamed alternative?


Let's break down the facts:

Calories: Steamed modaks are significantly lighter compared to fried ones, making them the smarter choice for those who want to enjoy festivities without the guilt.


Fat Content: Fried modaks are loaded with extra oil from deep frying, while steamed versions give you all the authentic taste with a fraction of the fat content.

The Steamed Modak Advantage:


Retains traditional flavors without excess oil

Easier on digestion during heavy festive meals

Perfect for maintaining your health goals during celebrations


Smart Portion Control: Enjoy 1-2 steamed modaks alongside your main meal to satisfy those sweet cravings without going overboard.

Struggling to Quit Alcohol? Start Small with This Tip


You don’t have to give it up overnight. Our founder, Khyati Rupani, has shared a tip on how one small swap can be your game-changer

data.title: Craving Dessert While Losing Weight? Try the 2-Bite Rule
data.description:
Losing weight or improving your health doesn’t mean cutting out everything you enjoy.


As someone who has lost 40kg and reversed PCOS naturally, our founder, Clinical Nutritionist Khyati Rupani, knows firsthand how impractical it can be to give up sweets entirely.


At Balance Nutrition, we use the 2-Bite Rule — a mindful and scientific way to manage cravings for desserts or calorie-dense treats without derailing your progress.


Two mindful bites are often all it takes to curb the craving. No need to rely on extremes or eliminate your favourite foods — we focus on balance, not restriction.


This is how we help clients achieve consistent results in our weight loss, hormonal balance, and gut health programs.


Pro Tip: The rule works best when used in moderation. A few thoughtful bites each month can satisfy the mind — and keep the body on track.

data.title: Subway Sandwiches OVER 250 Calories Are A BIG MISTAKE
data.description:
A typical sandwich at Subway can be 550 to 650 calories!


Here’s how I build a weight-loss-friendly, no insulin spike sandwich under 250 calories:


✅ Bread: Choose Multigrain or Honey Oats – scoop out the soft part, keep just the crust.


Skip the cheese, it adds unnecessary calories and fat.


Toast it, It releases dextrin, making it crispier and tastier.


✅ Veggies: Go all in – lettuce, cucumber, onion, tomato, peppers (avoid marinated ones).


Add only a few olives – a tiny boost of flavor, not fat.


✅ Best sauces: Mustard or BBQ – both are usually fat-free.

data.title: Shocking Truth About Your Summer Diet! 😱 🥵
data.description:
If your stomach’s throwing a full-on summer tantrum… don’t worry, it’s probably not just you being dramatic, blame the heat! 😵‍💫🔥


Loose motions? Random acidity? That mysterious afternoon bloat?


Nope, it’s not Mercury retrograde. It’s that sketchy leftover you thought was still good. 👀

☀ In this kinda heat, food turns faster than your mood on a Monday morning.


That paneer tikka sitting out “just for a bit”? Yeah... it’s plotting against you.


And when your gut’s upset, your vibes follow. Every. Single. Time.


✨ So, what can you actually do?


🧊 Refrigerate like you mean it, don’t just shove stuff in the fridge, make sure it’s cool enough to keep it fresh.


🥣 Stick to fresh food if it smells “kind of okay,” it’s probably not.


💧 Chaas + a pinch of pink salt = summer lifesaver, hello hydration and happy gut!


🧠 Eat right, feel right, your nutrition is working overtime behind the scenes, so show it some love.


Basically, your gut is texting you in all caps. Time to listen and give it the summer TLC it deserves. 😮‍💨

All about Volume of Foods & Calories
data.description:
All about Volume of Foods & Calories


Did you know that weight loss is not just about the number of calories you consume in a day?


Yes,


If you want to lose weight & sustain your diet for the long term, then you have to focus on the foods that are HIGH in Volume & Low in Calories.


👍✅ Foods that are high Volume & Low Calories:


1. Watermelon (250g): 75 calories

2. Berries (1 cup): 80 calories

3. 1 bowl Clear Veg Soup: 50 calories

4. 1 bowl bhel: 120 calories

5. 1 bowl Saute cabbage: 65 calories


These kinds of foods are very helpful when added to your main meals or snacks as they keep you FULL making it easy to lose weight.


👎🛑 Foods that are Low Volume High Calories:


1. Coconut Chutney (2 tbsp): 105 calories

2. Flax/Pumpkin seeds: 80 calories

3. Full Fat Paneer (100g): 265 calories

4. Nuts (100g): 650 calories

5. 2 Slices Butter Toast: 500 calories

data.title: Gond Katira Hacks You NEED to Know! 🚨
data.description:
Comment 'YES' if you're ready to start your wellness program with us :)


INGREDIENTS for 1 Serving Super Drink:


4 tsp Sattu (roasted gram flour)

2 tsp Gond Katira (pre-soaked)

Pinch of pink salt

1 tsp Roasted Jeera Powder

200 ml Buttermilk (chass)


Method:

➡ In a glass, add satu, gond katira, pink salt, and roasted jeera powder.

➡Pour in chilled buttermilk and stir until smooth.

➡Top with fresh coriander leaves and enjoy!


Why I love it (and why you will too):


Satu keeps you full and gives your body clean plant protein & it's easy on digestion. Gond katira is a natural body-cooler & aids weight loss. Pink salt helps your body stay hydrated and balances your sodium. Roasted jeera powder does wonders for bloating and supports digestion. Buttermilk is light, probiotic-rich, and great for your gut. Coriander adds freshness and a dose of vitamin C.


Will you add this to your diet?

👉🏻The gel formed is due to mucilage and digestible fiber and helps in stool movements!


👉🏻It not only helps to relieve constipation but also in regulating body weight, blood sugar level & health of the colon!


But don’t forget to drink water throughout the whole day for this recipe to work well or it can cause you issues like bloating, diarrhea & stomach ache


Here’s how you can make it 👇

Recipe:


*Milk of your choice- 100 ml

*Soaked Chia seeds - 1.5 tsp

*Mixed Fruits (avoid mango if diabetic) - 1 katori

*Almonds/Walnuts- 2-3 pieces

*Cinnamon Powder - a pinch


Step 1:

Mix milk and soaked Chia seeds in a bowl


Step 2 :

Store it in the refrigerator for an hour


Step 3 :

Top it with cinnamon, fresh fruit & nuts of your choice!

Bulletproof Coffee for Weight Loss | Keto-Friendly Pre-Workout Drink


This coffee became popular among those following Keto & Low-Carb diets. So adding this to your diet occasionally has quite a few benefits:

P.S. Honey is optional & this coffee is more effective without honey.


1. It is high in MCT, a fat found in butter & coconut oil that directly enters the bloodstream without having to metabolize via your liver.


2. It helps you stay fuller keeping hunger & cravings in control


3. You can use it as a meal replacement instead of breakfast to induce weight loss once a week.


4. It is an ideal pre-workout drink as it leads to an increase in stamina & helps you burn more calories.


5. It also provides a small amount of vitamins like A, D & E.


In conclusion, this drink can be occasionally added to the diet of someone who wants to start weight loss, works out regularly & has no underlying disorder like Diabetes or High cholesterol.

data.description:
The 9-Calorie Noodles You’ll FALL IN LOVE With! Zero Fat, Low Carb, Guilt-Free Recipe


Yes, you heard that right, Shirataki noodles have only 9 calories per 100 grams!

They’re fat-free, low-carb, and absolutely perfect for your weight-loss journey.


Here’s how to make this delicious and healthy bowl in minutes


Ingredients:

Mixed Vegetables (Carrot, Cabbage, Spring Onion, etc.)

Oil – ½ tsp

Vinegar – 1 tsp

Soya Sauce – 1 tsp

Shirataki Noodles – 1 katori

Schezwan Sauce – ½ tsp

Salt – to taste

Pepper Powder – ¼ tsp


Method:

1️⃣ Heat a little oil in a pan.

2️⃣ Sauté your veggies.

3️⃣ Add vinegar and soya sauce.

4️⃣ Mix in a touch of Schezwan sauce for flavor.

5️⃣ Add the Shirataki noodles and a little water.

6️⃣ Boil until it reaches your perfect consistency.

7️⃣ Garnish with lettuce, corn, or your favorite toppings!


Enjoy this guilt-free, filling, and super tasty meal that supports your fitness goals!

data.title: TIP 4 OF THE BN GUT RESET CHALLENGE
data.description:
Why must you follow Khyati's Lunch Menu?


High-Fiber: Fiber acts as a prebiotic, feeding #weightlossjourney beneficial gut bacteria and promoting a balanced microbiome. This leads to improved digestion, reduced bloating, and overall gut health.


Probiotics: Curd and buttermilk are rich in probiotics. These healthy bacteria help maintain gut flora, improving digestion and supporting a strong immune system.


Moong is a high-fiber, nutrient-dense legume that aids in digestion. Combining it with fresh veggies adds essential vitamins, and minerals, enhancing gut function.


Including buttermilk in your diet increases the intake of probiotics, which can outcompete harmful bacteria and create an optimal environment for nutrient absorption.


Tofu is packed with plant-based protein and is low in calories, making it ideal for those managing weight. When added to your salad, it provides satiety, muscle-supporting protein, and keeps cravings at bay.

data.title: The Japanese have the lowest rates of obesity & and diseases.
data.description:
Why? Lets see.

"Japanese have the lowest rates of obesity & and diseases.


Here is what we can learn from them.


1. The traditional Japanese diet is a whole foods based diet rich in fish, seaweed and plant-based foods. They do not eat processed foods.


2. It consists of small portions of simple, fresh, and seasonal ingredients.

The use of chopsticks also reduces large amount of food ingestion.

Portion control is well followed.


3. Hot green tea or cold barley tea are the beverages of choice, while alcoholic drinks like beer and sake are rare.

So no snacking on junk!


4. The traditional Japanese diet is naturally rich in various nutrients, including fiber, calcium, potassium, magnesium, iron, and vitamins A, C, and E & low in salt, sugar and fat.


Thus we can certainly start following their dietary guidelines.


This eating pattern is rich in nutrients and may provide numerous health benefits, including improved weight loss, digestion, longevity, and overall health."

data.title: Do You Have Hidden Inflammation? #khyatirupani #food #recipe #healthyeating
data.description:
Do You Have Hidden Inflammation?


Most people don’t realise chronic inflammation shows up as fatigue, bloating, stubborn weight, skin issues, joint pain, or low immunity, long before any medical test confirms it.

The good news? Your diet and daily habits can reverse it.


Today, we’re sharing a simple Anti-Inflammatory Morning Drink used by thousands of our clients to kick-start healing naturally.


ANTI-INFLAMMATORY TEA (Daily Morning Drink)


Ingredients:

• Hot water – 1 glass

• Turmeric – ½ tsp

• Pepper powder – ¼ tsp

• Fresh lime juice – 1 tsp


Method:


Add turmeric & pepper to hot water.


Squeeze fresh lime.


Stir well and sip it on an empty stomach.


Why This Works

Turmeric – reduces inflammation & boosts immunity

Pepper – increases curcumin absorption by 2,000%

Lime – supports detoxification & reduces oxidative stress


Just 10 days of this routine can help you feel lighter, less bloated, and more energetic.


Comment “YES” if you want to know more about inflammation & our Anti-Inflammatory Diet Programs.

We’ll guide you personally.

data.title: Think Crepes Are Healthy? Here’s the Truth #balancenutrition #recipe #food #healthyfood
data.description:
Think Crepes Are Healthy? Here’s the Truth.


Crepes are French, elegant, and seem light but nutritionally, they’re not your friend.


Here’s the truth most people don’t know:


❌ Made with refined flour (maida) – spikes blood sugar & slows fat loss

❌ Low in fibre & protein – keeps you hungry soon after

❌ Often paired with sugary fillings – Nutella, syrups, jams = instant calorie overload

❌ Feels light but is calorie-dense – looks small, eats big!


So before you choose that “light breakfast,” remember:

Looks healthy ≠ IS healthy.


Want better breakfast options that taste good AND support weight loss?
